title: Projection-Based Centering of Polytopes Revisited: code, data, figures, and tables
description: Reproduction package for the paper 'Projection-Based Centering of Polytopes Revisited': Python implementation of the P-center and CN-center projection methods with orderings, blocks, multiplicity weights, relaxation, and hybrid variants; all experiments (E1-E7), raw results, figures, and tables. Every number, figure, and table in the paper reproduces from fixed random seeds. Follow-up to Inayatullah et al., Advances in Operations Research 2019, doi:10.1155/2019/8218329.

creators.name: Inayatullah, Syed
creators.affiliation: Department of Mathematics, University of Karachi, Pakistan
